hero.name: Kaan Kapsız
hero.subtitle: A 16-year-old developer building real-world projects with modern web technologies.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: Kaan is a 16-year-old self-driven developer from Eskişehir, Turkey, currently attending Bahçeşehir Koleji as an 11th-grade student. With a dream of studying abroad, he balances exam prep with building real-world freelance projects using React, TypeScript, and modern web technologies.
